name: location-aware-search
description: Implement explicit location semantics, conditional forward geocoding, and geo-aware vendor ranking for BuyAnything search

thresholds.description: Search intent persists valid location_context for supported categories
Geo-aware search degrades gracefully when geocoding fails
Commodity search behavior does not regress when location is irrelevant

signals.description: Location mode classification uses locked v1 category defaults and LLM override rules
Vendor retrieval blends vector, FTS, and geo/service-area candidates when applicable
Ranking weights match the locked v1 table by location mode
Forward geocode cache is durable and respects v1 TTL rules

approval.change_reason: initial approval for scoped build-all planning artifacts
